title: Angst - Die schwache Stunde einer Frau
actors: Gustav Fröhlich, Valerie Boothby, Elga Brink
plot: Inge Duhan lives with her husband, the lawyer Erich Duhan, and her little daughter Susi in Berlin. Inge is a very attractive woman. She loves her husband and has always been faithful to him. On a holiday trip to the French Riviera...
